title: Copper No More
description: Changes that useless copper into money
body:
![Main Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KLcTX8rE/images/5b8f654a6e1af9a138d098ba12561c4aa28e9e9c.png
)

## Copper No More

This resource pack changes:

- Copper Ingot into a gold coin
- Raw Copper Block into a stack of cash
- Raw Copper into a wad of cash

Enjoy!
